entry.title: Pizza Picnic and SUP
entry.content: We had a chilled sunset picnic with boardgames and pizza, then ended this perfect day with Stand-up paddle board. Jie, JiaYi, WeiMing and Anshan all had their first time paddle boarding and they all managed their solo trip! Bravo!
entry.summary: We had a chilled sunset picnic with boardgames and pizza, then ended this perfect day with Stand-up paddle board. Jie, JiaYi, WeiMing and Anshan all had their first time paddle boarding and they all managed their solo trip! Bravo!

entry.title: NJU-UoB workshop on Climate, Environment and Health

link.title: NJU-UoB workshop on Climate, Environment and Health

entry.content:
Jinlin just attended the Nanjing University-University of Birmingham Research workshop! Working with Dr. Shan Huang and Dr. Yuru Guan, we will dive into marine mollusks—super important for biodiversity and also for seafood/fisheries. Really excited to see where this pump-priming collaboration leads. Also picked up a lot of cool new perspectives on environment, climate, and sustainability!

The organisers AI-generated team photos of researchers across continents!
entry.summary: Jinlin just attended the Nanjing University-University of Birmingham Research workshop! Working with Dr. Shan Huang and Dr. Yuru Guan, we will dive into marine mollusks—super important for biodiversity and also for seafood/fisheries. Really excited to see where this pump-priming collaboration leads. Also picked up a lot of cool new perspectives on environment, climate, and sustainability!

entry.title: Lab fieldwork at XinJiZhou
entry.content: This was our group’s first attempt at an insect biodiversity survey. The rain had just lifted, and the island was lush with spring vitality. We had an unexpected companion: a local dog that followed us through the fields for the whole day! But the ground was a muddy mess, and to make matters worse, our supervisor managed to run the three-wheel car into a roadside ditch. Memorable, to say the least.
entry.summary: This was our group’s first attempt at an insect biodiversity survey. The rain had just lifted, and the island was lush with spring vitality. We had an unexpected companion: a local dog that followed us through the fields for the whole day! But the ground was a muddy mess, and to make matters worse, our supervisor managed to run the three-wheel car into a roadside ditch. Memorable, to say the least.

entry.title: Start of Semester Meal
entry.content:
Embrace the start of the Spring Semester in a fancy shopping “named after” the PI.

Celebrating our three undergraduate students winning gold award in a review-writing competition with their work on “insect overwintering” during the Winter break.
entry.summary: Embrace the start of the Spring Semester in a fancy shopping “named after” the PI.

entry.title: HongShan Zoo Trip
entry.content: An unexpected warm and sunny day in the middle of the winter ought to be paired with a trip to our city’s beloved zoo, and a warm hotpot for dinner!
entry.summary: An unexpected warm and sunny day in the middle of the winter ought to be paired with a trip to our city’s beloved zoo, and a warm hotpot for dinner!

entry.title: Welcoming 2026 with an office clean-up and dinner!

link.title: Welcoming 2026 with an office clean-up and dinner!

entry.content:
It’s a tradition to do a big clean-up to welcome the New Year. The CEE members re-organised and deep-cleaned our student’s office, Now we have a fridge, a snack/beverage station and a common room for meetings! Afterwards, we went for a 铁锅炖 to treat ourselves :P

Check out our re-modelled student office:
entry.summary: It’s a tradition to do a big clean-up to welcome the New Year. The CEE members re-organised and deep-cleaned our student’s office, Now we have a fridge, a snack/beverage station and a common room for meetings! Afterwards, we went for a 铁锅炖 to treat ourselves :P

entry.title: Hike Qixia Mountain in Autumn
entry.content: CEE lab and Ziel lab jointly hike in Qixia Mountain at its best time!
entry.summary: CEE lab and Ziel lab jointly hike in Qixia Mountain at its best time!

entry.title: Welcome dinner to WeiMing and Chen

link.title: Welcome dinner to WeiMing and Chen

entry.content: The CEE group is delighted to welcome two enthusiastic new students. To celebrate our team suddenly tripling in size, Jie, WeiMing, Chen, and Jinlin went out for a barbecue. We had a great time exchanging MBTI types etc. The food was so tasty that we forgot to take a group photo! We’ll be sure to get one at our next gathering in December.
entry.summary: The CEE group is delighted to welcome two enthusiastic new students. To celebrate our team suddenly tripling in size, Jie, WeiMing, Chen, and Jinlin went out for a barbecue. We had a great time exchanging MBTI types etc. The food was so tasty that we forgot to take a group photo! We’ll be sure to get one at our next gathering in December.

entry.title: Goodbye dinner with Summer Research student, Xu Ge!

link.title: Goodbye dinner with Summer Research student, Xu Ge!

entry.content: Ge spent all her summer in the lab and Nanjing University Xianlin Campus to invent a easy and standardized way to evaluate the strength of species interactions (competition, parasitism and predation) and used it to understand the not-subtle difference that micro-climate had on species interactions. We will miss you, Ge, and we wish one day you will come back to our lab to further pursue your research interests!
entry.summary: Ge spent all her summer in the lab and Nanjing University Xianlin Campus to invent a easy and standardized way to evaluate the strength of species interactions (competition, parasitism and predation) and used it to understand the not-subtle difference that micro-climate had on species interactions. We will miss you, Ge, and we wish one day you will come back to our lab to further pursue your research interests!
